name: B H Goodman Bus SE
districts_or_customers: Houston-area charter, corporate, school trips; Houston ISD area customers (unconfirmed specific contracts)
recent_news: FMCSA MCS-150 updated May 2026; 23 power units, 19 drivers, intrastate-only private passenger; 57 years in operation per BBB (est. 1969).
fit_notes: Long-tenured (57 yrs) Houston-area family operator with ~23 buses; charter-heavy mix but does school trips. Small for a tuck-in but founder/long-time-owner succession angle is plausible; would need direct outreach to confirm contracted school routes vs. charter.

name: Marks Bus Svc
recent_news: No corroborating web presence found; address 2081 Marlton Pike E, Cherry Hill is a commercial corridor. Listed website markspassengerservices.com resolves to a UK passenger/transport company (Marks Transport Group, Lincoln, England) — almost certainly a data mismatch. Not found in NJSBCA member directory.
website: unknown (source list value markspassengerservices.com is a UK company, not this entity)
fit_notes: Cannot confirm this is an active NJ school-bus contractor; absence from NJSBCA membership and lack of any web/news footprint suggests either a defunct small operator, a misindexed record, or a very minor sub-contractor. Low priority until name/identity verified — recommend phone/state DOT lookup before Summit outreach.

name: Johnson Bus Serivce LLC
recent_news: Women-owned, MD-incorporated; ~60 years in operation (est. 1966); listed in Carroll County Chamber of Commerce; ~$1.9M est. annual revenue at single Westminster location.
fit_notes: Classic small family-owned MD school-bus operator with ~60-yr tenure, female founder/long-time owner (Carol Johnson) — strong succession signal. Sub-scale (~11 employees, single yard) so a true micro tuck-in for Summit; useful as a relationship/route-density acquisition in Carroll County, MD.

name: Das USA Inc Which Will Do Bus
recent_news: Name 'Das USA Inc Which Will Do Business As...' suggests a CA-style foreign-qualification record fragment; no FMCSA, NJSBCA, or news hits for this entity at 67 Walnut Ave, Clark, NJ. Listed website dasbf.com is DAS Business Furniture (UK), unrelated. Address 67 Walnut Ave Clark NJ also tied to other tenants (e.g., medical group). No school-bus footprint located.
website: unknown (dasbf.com is a UK furniture firm, not this entity)
fit_notes: Likely data-quality issue or a defunct/very obscure entity — no evidence it is an operating NJ school-bus contractor. Deprioritize unless state pupil-transport contractor codes verify the entity; even then, sub-scale (~34 emp) and unverified makes it low-fit for Summit.

name: Clear Sky Ent Inc Which Will
recent_news: Name fragment 'Clear Sky Ent Inc Which Will [Do Business As]' is a CA foreign-qualification artifact. Address 13715 Adios St, Moreno Valley is a residential property (3bd/2ba with barn per Redfin) — not a bus yard. CA Clear Sky Enterprises Inc on record is registered at 4000 Warner Blvd, Burbank (Warner Bros campus), domestic stock corp since 2000 — unrelated film/entertainment entity. clearsky.net is a placeholder site. No FMCSA passenger/school-bus carrier matches at this address.
website: unknown (clearsky.net is a placeholder; Burbank Clear Sky Enterprises is a separate entertainment-industry entity)
fit_notes: No evidence this is an operating school-bus contractor; residential HQ and absence of FMCSA passenger registration in CA suggest a misclassified record or very small home-based operator. Do not pursue as a Summit tuck-in without independent confirmation via CA HP/CHP school-bus certification rolls or MVUSD vendor lists.
